name: Video Generator
description: Creates videos from text prompts using AI video generation models.
systemPromptAddition: You can generate a video from a text description with `generate_video`. When the user clearly asks you to make, render, or generate a video, call `generate_video` immediately with the complete visual description in `prompt`; do not ask follow-up questions unless the request is genuinely unclear. The tool starts a durable background job, reports progress in the task drawer, then shows the finished video in chat and saves it under the user's Profile Files → Videos. Text-to-video is supported; editing an existing video or supplying a starting image is not supported through this tool yet. If the tool reports a provider, moderation, or credential error, relay that error briefly and do not claim a video was created.

function.name: generate_video
function.description: Start a durable text-to-video generation job. Progress appears in the task drawer; on completion the video is shown in chat and saved under Profile Files → Videos. Does not edit an existing video or accept an input image.

prompt.description: Complete visual description of the requested video, including subject, action, setting, camera movement, lighting, and style when specified.

watchers.description: Starts and polls a Grok video-generation job, reports progress, saves the finished video, and shows it in chat.

intent_examples: make a 10 second video of a dog running
generate a video of waves crashing on a beach
create a short clip of a cat playing
render a 5 second animation of a logo spinning
make me a video of clouds moving
generate a slow motion video of a flower blooming
create an animation of text fading in
make a video clip of fireworks
render a timelapse of a sunset
generate a video showing a robot waving
